HGSS.542.0000:
You’re a rookie Trainer, aren’t you?
I can tell!\f
That’s OK! Everyone is a rookie
at some point!\f
If you’d like, I can teach you a
few things.\r
OK, then! Follow me!\f
HGSS.542.0001:
Ohh... I’m sorry.
I forgot that you weren’t wearing the\r
Running Shoes!\f
I’ll try to go as slow as possible, so
try keeping up!\f
HGSS.542.0002:
This is a Pokémon Center. They heal
your Pokémon in no time at all.\f
You’ll be relying on them a lot, so
you better learn about them.\f
HGSS.542.0003:
This is a Pokémon Mart.
They sell Poké Balls for catching wild\r
Pokémon and other useful items.\f
HGSS.542.0004:
Route 30 is out this way.\f
Trainers will be battling their
Pokémon there.\f
If you go a little farther,
you’ll see Mr. Pokémon’s House.\f
HGSS.542.0005:
This is the sea, as you can see.\f
Some Pokémon are found only in water.\f
HGSS.542.0006:
Here...
It’s my house!\f
For your effort keeping up with me,
I’ll give you my Running Shoes!\r
They’re still warm!\f
...
...\f
Got you, didn’t I?
Don’t worry, these are brand new!\f
HGSS.542.0007:
[0103,0000,0000] received
the Running Shoes from the Guide Gent!
HGSS.542.0008:
The instructions read,
“Touch the Sprint Button on the\r
Touch Screen to sprint.”\f
It also says,
“Hold the B Button down to sprint.”\f
HGSS.542.0009:
...Hffp... Hffp...
I made it...\f
I forgot about one thing.
This is another token from me!\f
Take it.\f
HGSS.542.0010:
The Guide Gent loaded the Map Card
on [0103,0000,0000]’s Pokégear!
HGSS.542.0011:
[0103,0000,0000]’s Pokégear
can now show the Town Map!\f
HGSS.542.0012:
Select the Pokégear on the
Touch Screen and then select\r
the Town Map icon.\f
You’ll see the map of the region
you’re currently in!\f
The Pokégear becomes more useful as
you add Cards.\f
I wish you luck on your journey!\f
HGSS.542.0013:
...\f
You got a Pokémon at the Lab.
What a waste.\f
That’s a Pokémon that’s too good for
a wimp like you.\f
...
Don’t you get what I’m saying?\f
Well, I too have a good Pokémon.
I’ll show you what I mean!\f
HGSS.542.0014:
...\f
Do you want to know who I am?
...\f
I’m going to be the world’s greatest
Pokémon Trainer.\f
HGSS.542.0015:
Give it back!
That’s my Trainer Card!\f
Oh no!
You saw my name...\f
HGSS.542.0016:
Did you talk to the old man by the
Pokémon Center?\f
He’ll put a Map of Johto on your
Pokégear.
HGSS.542.0017:
When you’re with Pokémon,
going anywhere is fun.
HGSS.542.0018:
Mr. Pokémon’s house is still farther
up ahead.\f
You could use the Running Shoes if
you had a pair.\f
But beware of wild Pokémon and
Trainers!\f
When you run, the noise will
attract them.
HGSS.542.0019:
I battled the Trainers on the road.
My Pokémon lost.\f
They’re a mess! I must take them to
a Pokémon Center.
HGSS.542.0020:
A Pokémon I caught had an item.
I think it’s Mystic Water.\f
I don’t need it, so do you want it?\f
HGSS.542.0021: Back to fishing for me, then.
HGSS.542.0022: You don’t have room for this.
HGSS.542.0023:
Cherrygrove City
The City of Fragrant Flowers
HGSS.542.0024:
Guide Gent’s House
Full-of-Energy, High-Speed Old Man
